Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs 
WHERE bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO' AND (bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state) IN (SELECT bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs 
WHERE bs.upgrade IN (1, 2) AND bs.applicability = true GROUP BY bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state 
HAVING count(distinct(bs.upgrade)) = 2)) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/0e2cf0efe81b6aa30e5f73c5321b14bce152c329de7bf24d8ddadeb1cebe0f5c/fbfa93b9-e291-488e-a3f0-882fbedc2c14/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
